calendar.matters: HEARING ON JOSHAU BRYON ECHIRIBEL'S PETITION RECOGNITION OF CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER AND CHANGE OF NAME

HEARING ON JOSHAU BRYON ECHIRIBEL'S PETITION RECOGNITION OF CHANGE OF GENDER AND SEX IDENTIFIER AND CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Continued To Aug-21-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Joshua Bryon Echribel.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; Matter not reported.

Petitioner Joshua Bryon Echiribel appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name and gender filed June 24, 2024.

Order to show cause filed June 24, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed April 30, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition and the CLETS print out, the Petitioner is informed there is an outstanding warrant in Terrant County Texas. The Petitioner was instructed to reach out to Terrant County Sheriff's office and obtain documentation clearing that warrant.

A copy of the CLETS printout was provided to the the Petitioner at the direction of the court.

This matter is continued to August 21, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to give the Petitioner time to clear up any outstanding issues in Fort Worth, Texas.
